---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Describe the behaviour, not just the implementation.

## Which surface

- [ ] `dispatch` (control plane)
- [ ] `crew` (runtime)
- [ ] `memory` / `memory-mcp`
- [ ] `runner` (orchestrator / skills / safety hook)
- [ ] other / cross-cutting

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Anything else — references, prior art, screenshots.
